export default "### Creating a Town\n\n### Common Shops\n* Smith\n    * Weaponsmith\n    * Armorsmith\n* Cobbler\n* Carpenter\n    * Bowyer\n    * Fletcher\n* Leatherworker\n* Alchemist\n    * Potionmaster\n    * Demolitionist\n    * Poisoner\n* Herbologist\n    * Potionmaster (also)\n* Brewer\n* Farmer\n* Hunter\n* General Store\n* Enchanter\n\n### Bartering";
